subject_line: IR35 SDS: prove reasonable care, without the FTE drain
body_markdown:
Hi {{first_name}},

{{company_name}} is one of the larger IR35 operators in the UK staffing market. subject_line: 1099-NEC e-file is mandatory at 10+ forms now — and FIRE shuts down
body_markdown:
Hi {{first_name}},

If {{company_name}} pays 10 or more contractors, 1099-NEC e-filing is no longer optional — the IRS dropped the e-file threshold to 10 forms, and the old FIRE system is decommissioned at the end of 2026, so TY2026 filings have to go through IRIS (which needs a separate TCC that takes ~45 days to get).

Most finance teams discover this in January when it's a fire drill: chasing W-9s, fixing TINs, and figuring out IRIS at the deadline.

contractor-ops handles the whole chain — W-9 collection, TIN matching, 1099-NEC generation, IRIS e-file — in one workflow, so January is a click, not a scramble. Software/workflow tool; your CPA stays in the loop on any judgment calls.

Mateusz Pitura
contractor-ops
